product_updates.title: SpaceX officially prices shares at $135 in the largest IPO ever
product_updates.content: Wits its official share pricing announcement, SpaceX's IPO has begun.

product_updates.title: SpaceX SPV investors won’t know their true holdings until post-IPO lock-ups lift
product_updates.content: After SpaceX makes its public debut, lower-tier SPV investors face hidden fees, lengthy payout delays, and the risk of outright fraud.

product_updates.title: Deezer’s new tool can identify AI music from Spotify, Apple Music, and others
product_updates.content: Deezer introduced a tool that scans playlists from Spotify, Apple Music, and other platforms to identify AI music.

product_updates.title: Pool’s new app turns your screenshots into something useful
product_updates.content: Pool's new app automatically sorts screenshots into personalized collections, tracks down the original links behind saved content, and helps you rediscover products, recipes, travel ideas, and other things you meant to revisit.

product_updates.title: DoorDash’s new AI chatbot lets you order with prompts and photos
product_updates.content: The new chatbot, called Ask DoorDash, allows users to search the app for what they're looking for in their own words instead of having to scroll through restaurants and stores to build a cart.

product_updates.title: Opendoor’s India exit is fueling a bigger conversation about AI and outsourcing
product_updates.content: The decision comes as India emerges as the world’s largest GCC market.

product_updates.title: Anthropic’s Dario Amodei has just one direct report
product_updates.content: If founders and other business leaders weren't already envious of Dario Amodei, who sits atop one of the world's fastest-growing AI companies, they're going to be seriously envious now.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Google DeepMind is worried about what happens when millions of agents start to interact
technical_breakthroughs.content: Google DeepMind is funding research into the potential dangers of situations where millions of different AI agents interact with each other online. According to Rohin Shah, who directs the company’s AGI safety and alignment research, the mass-market arrival of agents that can carry out tasks with…

technical_breakthroughs.title: Job titles of the future: Nature’s drug designer
technical_breakthroughs.content: In 2018, after nearly two decades working in Big Pharma, chemist Tim Cernak was ready to put his skills to a new use. technical_breakthroughs.title: Why China is betting on big nuclear reactors
technical_breakthroughs.content: It’s a tale of two nuclear industries. In China, large reactors are coming together at a stunning pace. The country has nearly doubled its nuclear fleet since 2016, reaching nearly 60 gigawatts of total power capacity. The new facilities are nearly all gigawatt-scale pressurized-water reactors. M…
